name: Medical Care Technologies Inc.
business: The company is a children's healthcare service provider headquartered in Beijing, China, engaged principally in opening and operating children's integrated healthcare wellness centers and selling and distributing pharmaceutical and nutraceutical products. It has not yet generated or realized any revenues from its business activities.

exposures.sentence: We are a children s healthcare service provider headquartered in Beijing, China and engaged principally in opening and operating children s integrated healthcare wellness centers and selling and distributing pharmaceutical and nutraceutical products.

catalysts.event: Signed Joint Venture Master Agreement with Ocean Wise International Industrial Limited
catalysts.sentence: On April 28, 2011, we signed a Joint Venture Master Agreement with Ocean Wise International Industrial Limited ( OWII ), a private Hong Kong investment holding company, to partner in China s rapidly expanding pediatric healthcare segment.

catalysts.event: Received final licenses from City of Dongguan to open first flagship children's health and wellness center
catalysts.sentence: On August 1, 2011, we received approval for our final licenses from the City of Dongguan, Guangdong Province Department of Urban Planning and Department of Health to open and operate our first flagship children s health and wellness center.

tamClaims.claim: 15 of China's Tier-2 cities account for 8 percent of the population but 54 percent of the total imports from the US.
tamClaims.sentence: According to figures from the US Commercial Service, 15 of China's Tier-2 cities account for 8 percent of the population but 54 percent of the total imports from the US.
